examples: Dark comedy refers rather to the tragicomic form in which laughter and despair are inextricably mingled.
By bringing Mac, a character of true and now enduring tragicomic greatness, back to life, he provides ample compensation.
Mallory described the team's findings as "Gary Larson events" in reference to the tragicomic nature of Larson's the Far Side.
The tragicomic caricature does not describe what Democrats believe or what a centrist Republican might want.
Gogol's scenes light up their surroundings, his characters flame into life, his tragicomic vision touches the reader's heart.
